modules.image_generation_prompt: A tiny, cute ajwain seed puppet with realistic textured surface, visible grooves and natural brown-green color, stands on a lively Indian street near a paan shop. The character has large glossy expressive eyes, a tiny bump nose, a carved smiling mouth, small stubby arms with four-fingered hands, and short legs. It wears a tapori attitude pose, pointing toward the camera. Background includes scooters, posters, dim street lights, and shop shutters. Dramatic lighting highlights the character like a hero entry. Camera uses a Dutch Tilt Entry move for dynamic impact. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: RUN_IN + POINT_AT_CAM + CHEEKY_GRIN | CAMERA: Dutch Tilt Entry | EXPRESSION: cheeky grin, wide confident eyes | DIALOGUE: ए बंटाई! अजवाइन हूँ मैं — तू गैस से फूला रहता है और दवा ढूंढता है? अरे पागल, मैं तेरे किचन में पड़ा हूँ, और तू मुझे इग्नोर करता है! अबे सीख ले आज! | LIP-SYNC: tight sync markers | PACING: Fast reel energy | Duration: 8s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 7.8s | WORD COUNT: ~32 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A cute ajwain seed puppet with detailed natural texture and realistic lighting stands on the same Indian street environment but now calmer, near a chai stall with warm light. The puppet has big shiny eyes, tiny nose, expressive mouth mid-speech, small arms gesturing while explaining, and short legs. It is drawing attention to itself while slightly floating with confidence. Background shows kettle steam, warm yellow lights, and a relaxed vibe. Camera uses Gentle Side Dolly for smooth motion. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: FLOAT_RISE + RAISE_FINGER + NOD_TEACH | CAMERA: Gentle Side Dolly | EXPRESSION: confident teaching smile, focused eyes | DIALOGUE: ए बंटाई, मेरे अंदर थाइमोल है — वही केमिकल जो बड़े-बड़े एंटीसेप्टिक में होता है! ये पेट की गैस, एसिडिटी को सीधा कंट्रोल करता है। बस चुटकी भर अजवाइन गरम पानी के साथ ले, और देख पेट कैसे सेट हो जाता है। | LIP-SYNC: precise markers | PACING: Dense teacher | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~43 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A realistic ajwain seed puppet character stands in the same Indian street but with slightly cooler dramatic lighting, near a dim street lamp. The puppet has expressive eyes narrowed seriously, a firm mouth, small arms raised in warning gesture, and sturdy legs planted. The background shows quiet street, slight shadows, and focus on the character. The puppet transitions to a friendly wave at the end. Camera uses Slow Intimate Push-in for tension then warmth. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: STOP_HAND + WAG_FINGER + WARM_WAVE | CAMERA: Slow Intimate Push-in | EXPRESSION: serious warning eyes then soft smile | DIALOGUE: ए बंटाई, ज़्यादा अजवाइन खाया तो जलन और मुँह में छाले भी हो सकते हैं, समझा क्या? अगर दवाई चल रही है तो डॉक्टर से पूछ पहले। सही यूज़ करेगा तो हीरो बनेगा। अब फॉलो कर, और ऐसे देसी ज्ञान लेता रह! | LIP-SYNC: accurate sync | PACING: Urgent then warm | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~45 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.
